src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation import with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3.x (which uses Jakarta EE 9+); using javax.annotation.PostConstruct results in a compile error (cannot find symbol).

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Refactor string concatenation into a Java 21 text block for improved readability.
Remove dependency on Lombok's type inference feature.
Replace Lombok's 'val' keyword with Java's 'var' for local variable type inference.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with WebSecurityCustomizer and SecurityFilterChain beans.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6 (required by Spring Boot 3.x).

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from override method to SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: The configure(HttpSecurity) method is part of the removed WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter; Spring Security 6 requires defining SecurityFilterChain beans.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.before:
@Override
    protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity DSL to use lambda-based configuration and new method names.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: Old DSL methods like authorizeRequests() and antMatchers() are removed in Spring Security 6; new API uses authorizeHttpRequests() and requestMatchers() with lambdas.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Migrate WebSecurity configuration from override method to WebSecurityCustomizer bean.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: The configure(WebSecurity) method is part of the removed WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter; Spring Security 6 requires defining WebSecurityCustomizer beans.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Update WebSecurity ignoring configuration to use requestMatchers.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: antMatchers() is removed in Spring Security 6; requestMatchers() must be used instead.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace Lombok's `val` with Java's `var` to remove dependency on Lombok for local variable type inference.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: Compile error if Lombok is removed or if the project is migrated to a setup that does not include Lombok annotation processing.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from `javax.validation` to `jakarta.validation` namespace.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: Compile error: package `javax.validation` does not exist in Jakarta EE 10+ / Spring Boot 3.x environments.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Migrate WebSocket annotations from `javax.websocket` to `jakarta.websocket` namespace.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: Compile error: package `javax.websocket` does not exist in Jakarta EE 10+ / Spring Boot 3.x environments.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace `String.format` with `String.formatted` method introduced in Java 15.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: Polishment: `String.format` still works, but `String.formatted` is the modern idiomatic approach in newer Java versions.

\
